name: walmart_v3_tasks
description: Curated Walmart benchmark tasks for DomBot benchmark_v3.

tasks.task: On walmart.com, search for 'wireless mouse', add the cheapest in-stock non-sponsored item with rating >= 4.0 and at least 100 reviews to cart, open cart, and return exactly 4 lines from cart page only: (1) product title, (2) unit price, (3) cart item count, (4) cart subtotal. If any field is missing, fail.

On walmart.com, search for 'usb c hub', add the cheapest in-stock non-sponsored item with rating >= 4.0 and at least 100 reviews to cart, open cart, and return exactly 4 lines from cart page only: (1) product title, (2) unit price, (3) cart item count, (4) cart subtotal. If any field is missing, fail.

On walmart.com, search for 'wireless keyboard and mouse combo', add the cheapest in-stock non-sponsored item with rating >= 4.2 and at least 500 reviews to cart, set quantity to 2 in cart, and return exactly 5 lines from cart page only: (1) product title, (2) unit price, (3) quantity, (4) cart item count, (5) cart subtotal. If any field is missing or quantity is not 2, fail.
